title: TurulPowerX
description: TurulPlugin is helping for admins to have fun, and keep the server clean
body:
**TurulPowerX** is a Minecraft Spigot plugin that allows players to use various commands, such as striking other players with lightning or even killing a player with a simple command. The plugin aims to provide an engaging and interactive experience for servers, especially for players who want to customize events and commands.

![strike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bc3b6fa798ca576c47acf99d3149c22c474aba4.png)
![The Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78ed7bce4eac12c462ccaab6cfc7903b982b88a8.png)

**Features:**

Lightning Strike Command (/tpx strike): Players can strike another player with lightning by using the command /tpx strike <player>.
Kill Player Command (/tpx kill): Players can kill another player using the command /tpx kill <player>. This is a quick and simple way to influence the game.
Multilingual Support: The plugin allows the use of different languages, so players can enjoy the commands in their preferred language.
Command Permissions: The plugin assigns permissions to each command, ensuring that only authorized users can execute them.
Custom gui: The plugin has a custom gui and erasy to use.
Custom tools: The plugin has a custom tools to use.
![turulpowerx plugin v1.0.134--main.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b4e77a688cd1d9b681cf1499fc3d2cb22b8e73f.png)
![Tools Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/306db93b575d907fe971c7eb30daaafe4801b00c_0.webp)

**Commands:**
1. /tpx strike: Strikes the specified player with lightning.
2. /tpx kill: Kills the specified player.
3. /tpx help: Provides information about the plugin's commands.
4. /tpx up: The player will suddenly look up.
5. /tpx reload: Reloads the config.yml changes.
6. /tpx boom: Explodes the specified player.
7. /tpx hunger: Starves the specified player.
8. /tpx chili: The player receives the Nausea effect for 20 seconds.
9. /tpx fall: The player will be teleported 50 blocks higher into the air.
10. /tpx warden: Spawns a warden at the specified player's location.
11. /tpx lagg: Teleports the specified player to their position from 5 seconds ago.
12. /tpx sparta: A shower of arrows will fall on the specified player.
13. /tpx anvil: An anvil will fall on the specified player.
14. /tpx fakecrash: The specified player will be kicked with the reason 'Server crashed'.
15. /tpx creeper: Summons a specified number of creepers on the given player.
16. /tpx zombie: Summons a specified number of zombies on the given player.
17. /tpx invisible: Toggles the visibility of the given player.
18. /tpx drop: The item held by the given player will be dropped.
19. /tpx down: The given player will be teleported 3 blocks down.
20. /tpx down: The given player will be teleported 3 blocks down.
21. /tpx cobweb: The specified player will be surrounded by cobwebs for 10 seconds.
22. /tpx box: The specified player will be trapped in a box for 10 seconds.
23. /tpx justrun: The specified player must run for 1 minute, or they will die if they stop.
24. /tpx spin: The specified player will spin for 10 seconds.
25. /tpx headswap: Two specified players will swap heads for 10 seconds.
26. /tpx fakeop: The specified player will receive a fake message: 'You are now an Operator.'
27. /tpx confused: The specified player will have reversed movement controls for 10 seconds.
28. /tpx gui: The TurulPowerX menu is open

**Tools:**
1. /tpxt float_stick
2. /tpxt freeze_stick
3. /tpxt knockback_stick
4. /tpxt slip_stick
5. /tpxt strike_stick

**Settings:**
Languages:
- English (en)
- Hungarian (hu)
- German (de)
- French (fr)
- Spanish (es)
- Italian (it)

**Permissions:** ![all permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b75e8960e52b937a9f46d61b35857fecdcf53678.png)

TurulPowerX is an easy-to-use and customizable plugin that enhances the gaming experience and allows servers to offer fun commands and events to players.

![plugin 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6f275e2bb6d444b16ca563342e46aa56253ae8e.png)![plugin 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c04cbc6977dd2b6d975f0310d74c7132bcc54957.png)![plugin 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cef0a1ddb13ff3291d4a4426992f1377636298b.png)
